channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: New iPhone 18 Pro leaks explore design details, dimensions, more - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. New iPhone 18 Pro leaks explore design details, dimensions, more  9to5Mac
  2. Apple iPhone 18 Pro Price Detailed In New Report  Forbes
  3. The 'Mechanical Eye': Why the iPhone 18 Pro will ruin older smartphone cameras for you  PhoneArena
  4. iPhone 18 Pro Max, iPhone 18 Pro: Price in India, launch date, full specifications, camera, colours, all latest leaks  MSN
  5. Don't expect any visible change with the iPhone 18 Pro  AppleInsider

item.title: Persona 5 Royal to be Added to PlayStation Plus Catalog on March 17, 2026 - Persona Central
item.description:
1. Persona 5 Royal to be Added to PlayStation Plus Catalog on March 17, 2026  Persona Central
  2. Sony Confirms March PlayStation Plus Game Catalog Additions  IGN
  3. PlayStation Plus Game Catalog finally gets the best version of the best Persona game  Polygon.com
  4. The PS Plus Games Catalog is getting Space Marine 2 and Persona 5 Royal in March  Engadget
  5. PlayStation Plus Extra/Premium Games For March 2026 Revealed  GameSpot

item.title: Ex-Naughty Dog artist who helped design characters for Highguard promises to keep fighting the good fight - just not in the live-service sphere, anymore - Eurogamer.net
item.description:
1. Ex-Naughty Dog artist who helped design characters for Highguard promises to keep fighting the good fight - just not in the live-service sphere, anymore  Eurogamer.net
  2. As Highguard Enters Final Day, Dev Says Online Discourse "Accelerated The Timeline Of Our Failure"  GameSpot
  3. Highguard's failure is yet another case of a problem that has tormented videogame investors for years now  PC Gamer
  4. I Fell In Love With Highguard And Now It’s Gone Forever  Kotaku
  5. 2026’s Biggest Failure Could End Up Saving Future Games  ComicBook.com

item.title: Forza Horizon 6’s Tokyo City Is So Big and Detailed That it Had its Own Development Team | IGN First - IGN
item.description:

item.title: Phil Spencer Was Good for Xbox, but His Legacy Is Complicated - IGN
item.description:
1. Phil Spencer Was Good for Xbox, but His Legacy Is Complicated  IGN
  2. Microsoft's CEO to Xbox: We will "always" invest in gaming.  Windows Central
  3. “NVIDIA Wouldn’t Exist Without Gaming,” Says Microsoft CEO, But the Industry That Made It Possible Now Feels Left Behind  Wccftech
  4. Xbox Must Live Up To Expectations Of Fans Who Have 'Counted On Us', Says Microsoft Boss  Pure Xbox
  5. Microsoft CEO insists Xbox is a vital part of the company's core DNA  Gamereactor UK

item.title: MacBook Pro to Receive 'Major Upgrade' by Early Next Year - MacRumors
item.description:

  4. iPhone Fold will be called iPhone Ultra, guesses new leaker  AppleInsider

item.title: Poll: Has PS5's Dynamic Pricing Debacle Changed Your Relationship with the PS Store at All? - Push Square
item.description:
1. Poll: Has PS5's Dynamic Pricing Debacle Changed Your Relationship with the PS Store at All?  Push Square
  2. Sony is reportedly running a dynamic A/B pricing experiment on PlayStation Store  GamesIndustry.biz
  3. Sony's PlayStation Store has been testing dynamic pricing on games  Polygon.com
  4. Fans Outraged by PlayStation’s Pricing Test: ‘Should Be Illegal’  Newsweek
  5. PlayStation 5 Is Showing Different Players Different Prices For The Same Game  Kotaku
